title: acranthera variegata
intro: Acranthera variegata is a plant species that belongs to the family Guttiferae, native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Acranthera variegata include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from skin irritations. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as an infusion or decoction for its therapeutic use, and it can also be extracted into a tincture or used in topical applications.
